hero.headline: Innovative Digital Solutions For Your Business
hero.subheadline: We transform your ideas into digital reality with custom web and software solutions that drive your business toward success.

services.headline: Our Services
services.subheadline: Complete and personalised services to transform your vision into digital reality and propel your business toward success.

web.title: Web Development
web.desc: We create modern, high-performance and scalable websites and web applications that perfectly meet your needs and exceed your expectations.

mobile.title: Mobile Applications
mobile.desc: Development of native and cross-platform mobile apps for iOS and Android, delivering an exceptional user experience.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce Solutions
ecommerce.desc: High-performance and secure online stores with advanced features to maximise your sales and build customer loyalty.

software.title: Custom Software
software.desc: Development of bespoke software that precisely meets your company's specific needs and optimises your processes.

about.headline: Who Are We?
about.subheadline: We Are Your Partners in Digital Innovation
about.desc: E-LaunchIT is a web and software development agency founded in 2024 by a team of digital enthusiasts. Our mission is to create innovative technological solutions that address the challenges of modern businesses. What started as a small team in a Paris co-working space has quickly grown into a recognised agency in French web and software development.

why.headline: Why Choose Us?
why.subheadline: We combine innovation, technical expertise and commitment to our clients' success to deliver exceptional results.
why.quality_desc: We follow best development practices to ensure robust, secure and easily maintainable solutions.
why.design_desc: Our interfaces are designed to be visually appealing and deliver an exceptional user experience.
why.delivery_desc: We understand the importance of your time and commit to delivering your projects within agreed deadlines.
why.support_desc: From design to launch, we are at your side to advise and guide you every step of the way.

team.headline: Our Team
team.subheadline: Meet the passionate experts who make E-LaunchIT an exceptional web and software development agency.
team.thomas_bio: With over 15 years of experience in web development, Thomas founded E-LaunchIT with the vision of creating an agency that combines technical expertise with a client-centred approach.
team.sophie_bio: An expert in software architecture and full-stack development, Sophie oversees all technical aspects of projects to ensure robust and scalable solutions.
team.emilie_bio: With a sharp eye for design and user experience, Émilie creates intuitive and aesthetic interfaces that transform every interaction into a memorable experience.

portfolio.headline: Our Completed Projects
portfolio.subheadline: Discover our work and how we've helped our clients achieve their digital objectives.
portfolio.p1_desc: Web management application with advanced analytics dashboard for marketing campaign tracking.
portfolio.p2_desc: Financial management software for SMEs with analytics dashboards and budget forecasting.
portfolio.p3_desc: Website for a contemporary art gallery with virtual tours and online artwork sales.
portfolio.p4_desc: Telemedicine application allowing patients to consult doctors remotely and manage their medical records.
portfolio.p5_desc: E-commerce platform for eco-friendly products with a loyalty programme and zero-waste delivery.
portfolio.p6_desc: Intelligent home automation system for energy management and control of household appliances.

testimonials.headline: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.sophie_quote: The E-LaunchIT team completely transformed our online presence. Our new website is not only beautiful but also extremely high-performing and easy to manage. Their expertise and professionalism exceeded all our expectations.
testimonials.thomas_quote: Working with E-LaunchIT was an exceptional experience. They took the time to understand our vision and developed a mobile application that revolutionised the way we serve our clients. Their collaborative approach and technical expertise are unmatched.
testimonials.marie_quote: Our online store developed by E-LaunchIT exceeded all our expectations. Sales increased by 200% in just three months. Their team was attentive to our needs and created a perfectly tailored e-commerce solution for our brand.

contact.headline: Contact Us
contact.subheadline: Fill in the form below to tell us about your project or questions. We will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.name: Full name
contact.success_desc: Thank you for your message! We will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.info_desc: We are available to answer all your questions.

cta_section.headline: Ready to Transform Your Vision into Reality?
cta_section.desc: Contact us today and discover how we can help you achieve your digital objectives.

footer.tagline: Your trusted partner for innovative and bespoke digital solutions.
